block.name: Wire full substrate signal loop into Chat tab (#192)
acceptance_criteria: agent_loop uses ingest_tool_result(worker_ng, 'user_message') instead of ctx.ng.on_message
worker_ng.step() is called after user message ingestion
System prompt section reads 'Substrate Context' not 'Relevant Memory'
Response is deposited via ingest_tool_result(worker_ng, 'assistant_response') after each turn

outputs.name: app.py
outputs.contract: Full substrate signal loop wired: dual-pass ingest, step(), spreading activation recall, response deposit

never: Do not modify anything outside agent_loop and the changelog header
Do not change the tool registry, policy engine, spec executor, or orchestrator
Do not restart any running service
anti_drift: Only modify the NG ingestion block, the recall/system_prompt block, and add the response deposit. Nothing else.

steps.description: Check if worker_ng.step() is already wired into agent_loop

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('app.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; print(sum(1 for l in lines if 'worker_ng.step()' in l))"

steps.description: Apply signal loop patch only if not already present

if_true.description: Decode and write the patch script to /tmp

params.command:
python3 -c "
import base64
script = base64.b64decode(b'''''').decode()
with open('/tmp/ng192_patch.py', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(script)
print('SCRIPT_WRITTEN')
"

if_true.description: Apply the substrate signal loop patch to app.py

if_false.description: Signal loop already wired — nothing to do

steps.description: Confirm all four signal-loop changes are present

params.command: python3 -c "c=open('app.py').read(); checks=[('worker_ng.step()','step'),('assistant_response','deposit'),('substrate_context','substrate'),('Codemine built this herself','changelog')]; missing=[l for s,l in checks if s not in c]; print('MISSING:'+str(missing) if missing else 'ALL_SENTINELS_PRESENT')"

steps.description: Commit app.py to Faux_Clawdbot and push to GitHub

params.command: cd /home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot && git add app.py && git diff --cached --quiet && echo ALREADY_COMMITTED || (git commit -m 'Wire full substrate signal loop into Chat tab (BLK-NG-192)' && git push && echo COMMITTED)

python3 -c "
import sys
path = '/home/josh/docs/punchlist/PUNCHLIST.md'
c = open(path, encoding='utf-8').read()
if '| 192 |' not in c:
    print('FAILED: row not found'); sys.exit(1)
rs = c.index('| 192 |')
re_ = c.index('\n', rs)
row = c[rs:re_]
if 'DONE' in row:
    print('PUNCHLIST_ALREADY_DONE'); sys.exit(0)
new_row = row.replace('| OPEN |', '| **DONE** (2026-04-20) — BLK-NG-192: full substrate signal loop wired by Codemine. Loop closes. |')
open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8').write(c[:rs] + new_row + c[re_:])
print('PUNCHLIST_UPDATED')
"

cd /home/josh/docs && git add punchlist/PUNCHLIST.md && git diff --cached --quiet && echo ALREADY_COMMITTED || (git commit -m '#192 DONE: Codemine wired her own signal loop (BLK-NG-192)' && git push && echo COMMITTED)
